clips.title: The Reader
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A quiet room beside a large window with sheer curtains. The scene is lit by soft diffused window light, gentle directional daylight wrapping the person's face, soft shadows, airy and calm. A person in a knit sweater sits reading by the window. Soft diffused window light, gentle wrap, airy shadow, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Morning Coffee
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A bright kitchen table by a window in the morning. The scene is lit by soft diffused window light, gentle daylight glowing across the person and a coffee mug, soft natural shadows. A person in loungewear sits with coffee. Soft diffused window light, gentle morning glow, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Rain
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A window streaked with rain, soft grey daylight outside. The scene is lit by soft diffused window light, cool gentle daylight on the person's face, soft shadows, moody and calm. A person in a sweater gazes out at the rain. Soft diffused window light, cool gentle wrap, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Studio
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. An artist's studio with tall north-facing windows. The scene is lit by soft diffused window light, even gentle daylight filling the room and wrapping the person, soft shadows. A person in a smock stands at an easel. Soft diffused window light, even gentle fill, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Stretch
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A serene room with a big window and a yoga mat. The scene is lit by soft diffused window light, gentle daylight glowing across the person, soft calm shadows. A person in athletic wear holds a gentle yoga pose by the window. Soft diffused window light, gentle glow, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Cafe
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A cozy cafe window seat, soft daylight outside. The scene is lit by soft diffused window light, gentle daylight wrapping the person at the table, soft shadows, warm and calm. A person in casual clothes sits by the cafe window. Soft diffused window light, gentle wrap, warm calm, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
